description: Foul-smelling cave reptilians whose nauseating stench and savage ambushes terrorize the underdark.
subraces: Common tunnel dwellers raiding in packs and marking territory with their overwhelming musk.
Abyssal-tainted kin from the lowest caverns -- larger and more vicious than their surface cousins.
Feral berserkers abandoning all tool use, attacking with claws, teeth, and raw fury.
